elements.text:
Figure 26.5-1B. Basic wind speeds for Risk Category II buildings and other structures.

This figure shows a map of basic wind speeds for Risk Category II buildings and other structures across the United States. The map displays wind speed contours with values in both mi/h and m/s (in parentheses), representing 3-second gust wind speeds at 33 ft above ground for Exposure Category C.

[Structured: {"type":"map","geography":"United States including Alaska and Hawaii","parameter":"Basic wind speeds (3-second gust at 33 ft above ground, Exposure Category C)","contour_values":["90(40)","95(42)","100(45)","105(47)","110(49)","120(54)","130(58)","140(63)","150(67)","160(72)"],"special_regions":"Hatched areas indicating regions where location-specific basic wind speeds shall be determined using the ASCE Wind Design Geodatabase"}]
elements.caption: Figure 26.5-1B. Basic wind speeds for Risk Category II buildings and other structures.

elements.text:
Notes:
1. Values are 3 s gust wind speeds in mi/h (m/s) at 33 ft (10 m) above ground for Exposure Category C.
2. Linear interpolation is permitted between contours. Point values are provided to aid with interpolation.
3. Islands, coastal areas, and land boundaries outside the last contour shall use the last wind speed contour.
4. Location-specific basic wind speeds shall be permitted to be determined using the ASCE Wind Design Geodatabase.
